project_type: Nx monorepo with Angular 21 SPA (apps/web), Lambda API (apps/api), CDK infra (apps/infra)
build_system: Nx 23.1.0 with pnpm 10.14.0. Angular CLI 22.0.7 as build executor.
test_framework: No test runner configured (unitTestRunner: none in Nx generators). Vitest is recommended but not installed.
verification_instructions: Run 'pnpm nx run-many -t build lint' to verify build and lint pass. This mirrors the CI workflow.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js >= 24 required.
contribution_requirements: PR title must follow semantic format: 'feat: description'. Standalone Angular components only, ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, selector prefix 'rm-'. SCSS co-located with components. TypeScript strict mode with noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature.
key_patterns: Components use inline templates/styles (single file). Services use providedIn: 'root'. Language switcher in AppComponent stores preference in localStorage with key 'rm-lang'. ConfigService loaded via APP_INITIALIZER. @ngx-translate for i18n with en.json and de.json. Colors: primary=#1c5b55, bg=#f8f7f2, text=#20201d, card-bg=#fff, border=#eee.
directory_structure: apps/web/src/app/ contains: app.component.* (root shell with header/nav), app.config.ts (providers), app.routes.ts (routing), auth/ (login, register, confirm, change-password, guard, interceptor, service), config/ (ConfigService), recipes/ (list, detail, form, import components + service). assets/i18n/ has en.json and de.json translation files.
